title: UI not responding with system status and cannot show collections
description: Admin UI appears unresponsive when trying to display system status information and collection details. While backend APIs respond correctly, the frontend JavaScript may be failing to update the UI elements.
resolution: Enhanced JavaScript error handling and debugging - added console logging, timeout handling, retry buttons, and user alerts for missing DOM elements
user_report: UI not responding with system status and can not show collections

root_cause_potential: Async/Promise handling issues in frontend code
UI element targeting failures after DOM changes
technical_analysis.backend_status: Working correctly - APIs respond in ~0.3-0.4 seconds

evidence.log_pattern: Regular successful API calls visible in server logs

reproduction_steps: 2. Observe System Status section - may show 'Loading...' indefinitely
3. Click 'Show Collections' button - no response or delayed response
4. Check browser console for JavaScript errors
5. Note: Backend APIs work when tested directly
expected_behavior: System status should display health checks (astra_vector, astra_graph, openai status). Collections info should appear when 'Show Collections' button is clicked.
actual_behavior: UI elements appear non-responsive or stuck in loading state despite backend functioning correctly

potential_causes.investigation: Check browser console for uncaught promise rejections

potential_causes.cause: DOM element targeting after recent UI changes
potential_causes.investigation: Recent changes to admin HTML structure may have broken element selectors
30-second auto-refresh may be interfering with manual button clicks
showCollectionInfo() function may have async issues

debugging_steps: 1. Add console.log statements to JavaScript functions
2. Check browser Network tab for failed requests
3. Verify HTML element IDs match JavaScript selectors
4. Test individual API calls vs UI interactions
5. Check for JavaScript timing issues with setTimeout calls

immediate_fixes.action: Add error handling and console logging to JavaScript functions
immediate_fixes.rationale: Identify where JavaScript execution is failing

immediate_fixes.action: Review recent HTML structure changes for broken selectors
immediate_fixes.rationale: Recent chunk-level cleanup UI may have affected element targeting

immediate_fixes.action: Add loading state management and error display
immediate_fixes.rationale: Provide user feedback when requests are pending or fail

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Admin functionality appears broken to users
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Affects admin usability but system functions

related_requirements: ADM-003: Admin UI must provide real-time system status
ADM-004: Collection management must be accessible and responsive
